features: 3D CAR AIR FRESHENER - Enjoy a refreshing smell every time you get in your car with this fun and innovative 3D car freshener that looks like an ice-filled cup of soda pop.

THINGS GO BETTER WITH CAR FRESHENER- Put a smile on your face and passers-by with this innovative and adorable 3D car air freshener. Place inside your car for an enjoyable, uplifting fragrance while you drive.
RIGHT AMOUNT OF FRAGRANCE - Not too strong, not too weak, this is the way car air fresheners are supposed to be. Continually replaces unpleasant car odours.
LONG LASTING - Lift your vehicle’s interior with a car air freshener for men and women that lasts and lasts.
100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE - If you’re not entirely pleased with your purchase, we’ll gladly provide a replacement or refund.
description: Product Description "DECORATE THE AIR As part of the Airpure family of products, the AIRPURE Coca-Cola Original 3D Car Freshener offers a convenient way to keep your vehicle’s interior smelling fresh. Decorate the air in your car by adding one of these fresh scent air fresheners in this fun and innovative design." Ingredients Car Freshener
